description:
Create a project dashboard named 'Sprint 1 Review' in the TailwindTraders project to provide a status snapshot for stakeholders. The dashboard must contain at least four configured widgets: 

1. A Markdown widget named 'Sprint Goals' containing this exact text:
- Complete product inventory search feature
- Fix all Priority 1 bugs
- Achieve 80% code coverage on new modules
2. A Query Tile widget showing the count of 'Active Bugs' using the shared query.
3. A Chart for Work Items widget showing 'Sprint 1 All Items' grouped by 'State' using the shared query.
4. One additional widget of your choice (e.g., Burndown, Assigned to Me).
